'''''Hope''''' was an [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Fleet]].<ref name="RfC" />

==History==
In the wake of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] dispatched a task force to the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]] to calm the fears of the recently invaded systems. The ''Hope'', under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arboga]], served with the task force alongside at least two other [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]]. When [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces ambushed them by following a [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] hidden aboard the [[Core Courier Service]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]] [[Messenger (starship)|''Messenger'']], the ''Hope'' led the defense against a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]].<ref name="RfC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Although the illustration of the ''Hope'' included in "[[Retreat from Coruscant]]" depicts the ship as an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] type [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]],<ref name="RfC" /> its entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' identifies it as an [[MC80a Star Cruiser]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|57|''Hope''}}</ref>
